summary: Frontend-only SEO regression for KOBIISRAEL.COM. Verified canonical URLs, meta titles/descriptions, robots meta, JSON-LD structured data, sitemap, robots.txt, /seo-review admin dashboard, legal noindex, smoke regression (mobile 390px, console, navbar/footer) and form integrations. All 13 features in the request PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: All checks green; no actionable code-review items raised. Helpers in /app/frontend/src/lib/seo.js are clean and idempotent; SEO_MAP in /app/frontend/src/data/seo.js correctly drives the dashboard with 17 rows; canonical host is consistently https://kobiisrael.life across HEAD tags and sitemap.
seed_data_creation: Created one TEST inquiry (id 97109864...) and one TEST newsletter subscription (test_seo_reviewer@example.com) during form regression. Both are real DB writes via /api/inquiries (201) and /api/newsletter (201). Safe to delete if cleanup desired.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 public pages set canonical https://kobiisrael.life<path>, unique titles (<=70 chars), descriptions, robots=index,follow, and >=1 valid JSON-LD block. Home has 3 (WebSite/Person/BreadcrumbList). Detail pages (/projects/cuba-love-story, /prints/cuba-soldier-portrait-01, /journal/a-chaos-of-appearances) all carry the expected schema types + BreadcrumbList. Five /legal/* pages return robots=noindex,nofollow. /seo-review, /launch-checklist, /migration-review all noindex,nofollow. /seo-review renders seo-review-page, seo-map-table (17 rows; filter 'prints' -> 2 rows), seo-redirect-table, seo-map-search. /sitemap.xml served and includes 10 main paths + project slugs (cuba-love-story, river-of-three-crossings, fragments-of-life) + journal slug (a-chaos-of-appearances). /robots.txt served with Disallow lines for /seo-review, /launch-checklist, /migration-review (Cloudflare also prepends managed bot rules — that is expected, not a bug). Mobile 390px: no horizontal overflow on any of the 10 smoke pages, navbar + footer present, zero console errors. Inquiry form testids are contact-form-* (not inquiry-*) and newsletter testids are journal-newsletter-* (not newsletter-*) — both submit successfully (201). No regressions detected.

test_results_detail.mobile_390px_smoke: All 10 pages: overflow=false (scrollW=390/winW=390), nav=true, footer=true, console_errors=0
